hero.headline: The handyman *Richmond calls back*
hero.subheadline: From ceiling fans to garbage disposals — one guy who shows up when he says he will.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: One call fixes it all
services_section.subheading: From the small stuff to the projects you've been putting off

services.title: Home Repairs & Maintenance
services.description: Fix what's broken, tune up what's not. Door handles, shelving, touch-ups — the stuff that makes home feel right.

services.title: Electrical & Plumbing
services.description: Ceiling fans, light fixtures, toilet installs, garbage disposals. The jobs that need doing right the first time.

services.title: Interior Projects
services.description: Paint jobs, sliding pantry shelves, screen repairs. Making your space work better for how you actually live.

services.title: Custom Solutions
services.description: Every house is different. We figure out what works for yours and make it happen.

about.heading: Built on repeat customers
about.body: We're the Richmond handyman team that does it right the first time. Real people answering the phone — not a call center.

reviews.name: Dana L.
reviews.text: Used Nazar's services multiple times — always happy with the quality, timeliness and communication. Can't recommend highly enough!

reviews.name: Marissa S.
reviews.text: He's been our go-to handyman for 4 years. Painted our garage, installed lights and fans, toilets, garbage disposals — helped with so many projects.

reviews.name: Alex M.
reviews.text: One of the best handymen I've worked with. Honest, fairly priced, shows up on time. Very professional and always does great work.

cta.heading: Ready to cross it off your list?
cta.body: Call or text for a free quote. Same day response, upfront pricing, no surprises.
